accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Give a two-minute warning before transitions.
Do not require unplanned oral responses in front of the class.
accommodations.source_quote: no unplanned oral responses in front of the class

accommodations.text: Break long assignments into smaller submitted parts.
accommodations.source_quote: break long assignments into smaller parts

services.source_quote: Speech and language therapy 30 minutes twice weekly

goals.text: Oscar will maintain a topic across three conversational turns in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Maintains a topic for one turn in 2 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: maintain a topic across three conversational turns

goals.text: Emma will request clarification when she misses information in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: request clarification when she misses information

goals.text: Diego will write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Writes a paragraph with a topic sentence in 1 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: write a paragraph with a clear topic sentence and three details

goals.text: Jamal will read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy.
goals.baseline: Reads grade-level text at 80 words per minute.
goals.source_quote: read grade-level text at 120 words per minute with 95% accuracy
